questions.question: What is the primary assumption of the Naive Bayes classifier, which is used for text classification and sentiment analysis?

A text dataset for sentiment analysis contains 80% positive and 20% negative reviews. If the prior probabilities of positive and negative classes are 0.6 and 0.4 respectively, what is the predicted probability of a positive review?
What is the purpose of the Laplace smoothing technique in text classification, and what is its effect on the model's performance?
